\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
comparison <- cbind(
  Month = rownames(USSteamCoHold),
  Recorded = USSteamCoHold$revenue,
  Lower = round(predictions[, "lwr"], 0),
  Expected = round(predictions[, "fit"], 0),
  Upper = round(predictions[, "upr"], 0)
)

comparison <- as.data.frame(comparison)

comparison$Recorded <- as.numeric(comparison$Recorded)
comparison$Expected <- as.numeric(comparison$Expected)
comparison$Lower    <- as.numeric(comparison$Lower)
comparison$Upper    <- as.numeric(comparison$Upper)

# Difference = Recorded - Expected
comparison$Difference <- comparison$Recorded - comparison$Expected

comparison
\end{Verbatim}
